; Level 4 — Cats and Chaos
; Format: symbol x y [width] [extra]
;   P = player start
;   # = platform (x y width height)
;   S = spike pit   (x y width height)
;   L = lava pit    (x y width height)
;   B = baby        (x floor_y min_x max_x)
;   C = cat         (x floor_y min_x max_x)
;   G = goal ball   (x y color)

P 80 724

; ── Ground with gaps ──
# 0    760 500 40
# 600  760 400 40
# 1100 760 300 40
# 1500 760 500 40
# 2100 760 300 40
# 2500 760 400 40
# 3000 760 500 40

; ── Upper platforms ──
# 150  620 250 20
# 450  520 200 20
# 800  600 200 20
# 1050 480 200 20
# 1300 560 200 20
# 1600 440 220 20
# 1900 540 200 20
# 2200 420 200 20
# 2500 520 200 20
# 2800 440 200 20
# 3100 560 200 20

; ── High platforms ──
# 300  360 200 20
# 700  300 180 20
# 1100 340 200 20
# 1500 300 180 20
# 1900 340 200 20
# 2300 300 200 20
# 2700 340 180 20
# 3100 300 200 20

; ── Spike pits ──
S 500 744 100 24
S 1000 744 100 24
S 1400 744 100 24
S 2000 744 100 24
S 2400 744 100 24
S 2900 744 100 24
S 3500 744 200 24

; ── Lava pits ──
L 600 648 200 60
L 2200 648 180 60

; ── Babies ──
B 200 760 0 500
B 800 760 600 1000
B 1250 760 1100 1400
B 1750 760 1500 2000
B 2250 760 2100 2400
B 2750 760 2500 3000
B 3250 760 3000 3500
B 500 620 150 400
B 900 600 800 1000
B 1400 560 1300 1500
B 2000 540 1900 2100
B 2600 520 2500 2700

; ── Cats ──
C 300 520 450 650
C 1100 480 1050 1250
C 1700 440 1600 1820
C 2300 420 2200 2400
C 2900 440 2800 3000
C 3200 560 3100 3300
C 400 360 300 500
C 800 300 700 880
C 1600 300 1500 1680
C 2400 300 2300 2500
C 3200 300 3100 3300

; ── Goal ball (gold) ──
G 3300 710 purple
